title: greenhouse.cycle.completed.v1 v1
description: One budgeted greenhouse evolution cycle finished (whatever the outcome). The observability heartbeat for autonomous background evolution. Source: /autobench/greenhouse.

stop_reason.description: Horizon reason from the kernel run (target_fitness | max_requests | max_wall_seconds | plateau | error).

candidates_dropped.description: How many validated candidates were exported to the drop dir.

window_requests_used.description: Greenhouse requests used in the current sliding window AFTER this cycle.

window_requests_budget.description: The greenhouse's own window cap (a deliberate slice of the shared plan budget, never the whole plan cap).

skipped.description: True when the cycle exited without evolving (budget exhausted, empty manifest, lock held).
